# Entity Relationship Diagram

This diagram shows how the cleaned analysis table was created from the raw table.

`raw_wdi_data` was created by retrieving World Bank WDI data through the Python `wbgapi` package and storing the results in SQLite.

```{mermaid}
erDiagram
    RAW_WDI_DATA {
        TEXT economy
        INTEGER time
        REAL NY_GDP_PCAP_KD
        REAL NY_GDP_MKTP_KD_ZG
        REAL SL_EMP_TOTL_SP_ZS
    }

    CLEAN_WDI_DATA {
        TEXT country_code
        TEXT country_name
        INTEGER year
        REAL gdp_per_capita
        REAL gdp_growth_pct
        REAL employment_ratio
        TEXT shock_period_flag
    }

    RAW_WDI_DATA ||--|| CLEAN_WDI_DATA : transformed_into

```
